creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
If OTOH PR ports/150327 was not committed yet, the correct
XPI_FILES/XPI_DIRS lines are the following:

XPI_FILES=    META-INF/manifest.mf META-INF/zigbert.rsa
META-INF/zigbert.sf chrome/stumbleupon.jar chrome.manifest
components/stumbleuponService.js install.js in
stall.rdf
XPI_DIRS=    META-INF chrome components

(I tested the port in both cases)
